title: Parnell
writer: John Van Druten, S.N. Behrman, Elsie T. Schauffler
actors: Clark Gable, Myrna Loy, Edna May Oliver
plot: The life of Irish politician Charles Stewart Parnell, following from 1880 onward his struggle to secure Home Rule, pursued in prison, Parliament, and elsewhere. Emphasis is on the relationship with married Katie O'Shea which threa...
